title: Shinde Denies Poaching Attempts; Shiv Sena (UBT) Rules Out Defections
description: Political circles in Maharashtra were abuzz after an unverified report claimed that eight Shiv Sena (UBT) MPs had recently held a secret meeting with Chief Minister Eknath Shinde in Thane. Mr. Shinde, however, said no such meeting had taken place.
